hero.description: I design digital experiences and build embedded interfaces in Angular and Vue with a clear, responsive, and implementation-ready visual base.
hero.supportCardText: UX, UI, functional documentation, operational leadership, and manual testing in the same workflow.

about.title: About me
about.intro: I work between UX, interface development, and delivery coordination.
paragraphs: My main focus is turning requirements into clear screens, consistent flows, and reusable components that respect user experience and the real context of each system.
I like structured work, visual order, and a strong base so front-end teams can integrate business logic without starting from zero.

stats.label: Combined roles: UX, UI, and leadership

items.title: Less ambiguity
items.description: Interactive Figma prototypes to validate structure and flow before development.

items.title: Faster integration
items.description: Reusable components and visual bases ready to integrate with functional logic.

items.title: Better clarity
items.description: Requirements documented with functional structure and traceability.

experience.title: Experience
experience.intro: A path focused on product thinking, visual structure, and implementation-ready interfaces.

items.role: UX Engineer | Project lead and UI developer
highlights: Business and development alignment through requirement analysis with stakeholders.
Lower implementation ambiguity through flows and Figma prototypes.
Better system traceability through UML documentation and test cases.
Faster front-end integration through Angular interfaces with reusable components.
Structured team workflow through operational leadership and priority planning.
Fewer delivery errors through documented functional testing and issue tracking.
Stronger user experience through front-end development in Vue 3, JavaScript, and CSS.
Visual consistency and scalability through reusable components.
Better experience through visual improvement of existing screens.
Interface standardization through visual guidelines adopted in the system.
Field validation of solutions to keep alignment with real operation needs.
Interactive prototypes in Figma showing complete flows and real app behavior.
Better data reading through chart integration inside interfaces built with JavaScript libraries.
Clearer requirements through functional documentation with UML.
Visual consistency through responsive UI components for Angular CLI.

projects.title: Selected projects
projects.intro: A small selection of interfaces where I mixed visual criteria, structure, and functional thinking.

items.title: Survey Analytics Dashboard
items.summary: An analytics panel with clear structure, filters, visual hierarchy, and charts made for quick reading.

items.title: Industrial Monitoring Dashboard
items.summary: A dashboard view for variable tracking with strong clarity, useful density, and continuous reading.

items.title: Personal Brand Interface
items.summary: A visual exploration for a personal brand with high contrast, clean composition, and a professional focus.

steps.title: Understand
steps.text: I collect requirements, system context, business needs, and real priorities.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: I turn information into wireframes, prototypes, and clear visual decisions.

steps.title: Build
steps.text: I develop UI in Angular or Vue with clean structure, components, and scalable styles.

steps.title: Review
steps.text: I document, test, and adjust to reduce errors and deliver a solid product base.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you need a UX Engineer with visual judgment, structural thinking, and real technical base, let’s talk.

footer.text: Portfolio built in Vue 3 with Bootstrap 5, JSON-driven content, and an editable structure ready to grow with you.
